landing.subtitle: Savings groups with real commitment. No fees, no middlemen.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Three steps to start your collaborative savings journey
landing.step1Desc: Set amount, frequency, and penalty rules. Share the code with your friends.
landing.step2Desc: Each member makes the first deposit to confirm commitment. The group is sealed when the creator starts the cycle.
landing.step3Desc: Regular deposits, penalties for those who miss, and redistribution to those who stay consistent.
landing.whySafeNudgeSubtitle: The protocol that replaces trust with code.
landing.feature1Desc: Funds protected by an audited smart contract. No person has access — only the code.
landing.feature2Desc: Miss a deposit, pay a penalty. Stay consistent, earn more. Aligned incentives.
landing.feature3Desc: No middlemen, no administration fees. Unlike traditional consórcios.
landing.feature4Desc: Every deposit, every penalty, every distribution is verifiable on-chain.
landing.readyToStartDesc: Create your first group in under 2 minutes. No sign-up, no paperwork.

createGroup.title: Create New Group
createGroup.subtitle: Set the parameters for your collaborative savings
createGroup.penaltyHint: Groups with penalties are 85% more likely to complete their cycle
createGroup.disclaimer: By creating, you agree to the audited smart contract terms

joinGroup.title: Exclusive Invitation
joinGroup.subtitle: You've been invited to join a savings group
joinGroup.pixOption: No balance? Add funds via Pix
joinGroup.nudgeStat: Groups maintaining consistency in the first 4 weeks are 85% more likely to reach their goal

groupDashboard.securityDetail: PDA-only vault authority. No admin keys.

emptyState.noGroups: You're not part of any group yet
emptyState.noGroupsHint: Start your collaborative savings journey by creating your own group or joining an existing one
emptyState.requestCode: Ask a friend for a code
emptyState.shareHint: Share the code with your friends

transaction.successDetail: Your transaction was sent and confirmed successfully on the network
transaction.securityNote: Never share your recovery phrase. SafeNudge never asks for your password outside the wallet.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Shall we try again?
errors.wrongNetwork: Your wallet is on the wrong network. Switch to Devnet.
errors.groupNotOpen: This group is not accepting new members
errors.cycleNotActive: This group's cycle hasn't started yet
errors.notCreator: Only the group creator can do this
